title: T-037 — Matrix Cell Edit Modal (matrix_cell_edit_modal)
prompt:
# T-037 — Matrix Cell Edit Modal

PRD: docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-07-02 §4.4 MODAL-07-02-CELL, §17.1 PLE-013, V-CM-04
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:322-378 (`matrix_cell_edit_modal`)
UX: prototypes/design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:563-579
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Dialog editing a single matrix cell: changeover_minutes, cleaning_required, atp_required, notes; segregation_required field HIDDEN from Planner role (V-CM-04 enforced).

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixCellEditModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog).
2. Form fields: minutes (Input number ≥0), cleaning_required (Switch), atp_required (Switch), notes (Textarea).
3. segregation_required Switch shown ONLY if user role IN ('Admin'); also requires confirmation step when toggled to true.
4. Save: calls /api/scheduler/changeover-matrix with single-cell change → creates new version (handled by T-018).

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixCellEditModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/__tests__/MatrixCellEditModal.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Planner role, when MatrixCellEditModal renders, then segregation_required Switch is NOT in the DOM (hidden via role guard, V-CM-04)
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:322-378, then it has same field set in same order (minutes, cleaning, atp, notes), same Save/Cancel buttons, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Input, Switch, Textarea, Button) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given Admin role + toggling segregation to true, when [Save] clicked, then confirmation step appears (second click required) before submit

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/MatrixCellEditModal.test.tsx covering segregation hidden for Planner + parity + Admin double-confirm
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test matrix/MatrixCellEditModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not show segregation field to Planner (hidden, not just disabled)
- Do not save without confirmation when Admin toggles segregation true
- Do not allow negative changeover_minutes (Zod min 0)

pipeline_inputs.description: Per-cell edit Dialog with role-gated segregation field + Admin double-confirm.
pipeline_inputs.details: shadcn Dialog. Role-gated rendering hides segregation_required entirely for non-Admin. Admin toggle requires confirmation step.
